positive: A cute, stylized cartoon depiction of a group of anthropomorphic woodland creatures (fox, owl, rabbit) having a picnic under a giant, smiling moon. The style is flat vector illustration, bright and cheerful, perfect for children's merchandise, clean outlines, pastel colors.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, dark, realistic shading
